set.body: Five scripts: benchmark-cancor.R, benchmark-krr.R, benchmark-pls.R, benchmark-kmeans.R, benchmark-lda.R. Ops: cancor, krr, pls, kmeans, lda. None are in benchmark-regression.R dispatch today. Rehab per contract; each exposes a single top-level op with size sweeps and backend variants. Accuracy check: compare to reference implementation (stats::cancor, kernlab::ksvm for krr sanity, pls::pls, stats::kmeans, MASS::lda) within tolerance. Add baseline rows.
set.title: Rehabilitate statistical-model benchmarks (cancor, krr, pls, kmeans, lda)
